vBRIEFInfo.author: panopticon-cli/0.0.0
vBRIEFInfo.description: Plan for PAN-1053: feat: Voice STT + AutoPreso whiteboard — Moonshine primary, Google Cloud STT fallback

plan.title: feat: Voice STT + AutoPreso whiteboard — Moonshine primary, Google Cloud STT fallback
plan.author: agent:claude-opus-4-7

narratives.Problem: Panopticon has no voice input capability. Users must type every message to agents. There is no visual whiteboard for voice-driven diagram sketching.
narratives.Proposal: Add a shared voice/STT WebSocket backend (ws-voice) that drives two output surfaces: (1) a collapsible VoiceWidget inside ComposerFooter that transcribes speech into the message composer, and (2) an AutoPreso view (/autopreso tab) that is a voice-driven AI whiteboard powered by Excalidraw. Moonshine ONNX runs on-device as the primary STT provider; Google Cloud Speech-to-Text is the hot-swappable fallback. The whiteboard agent uses @ai-sdk/openai for OpenAI, Codex, and Ollama providers. P4 (Windows sidecar) and P5 (TTS agent voice) are deferred to separate issues.

narrative.Action: Create packages/moonshine-linux-x64/ with package.json (os: linux, cpu: x64, optional dependency), bin/ directory placeholder, and README. Add as optional dependency in root package.json. This is the npm package shell that will hold the PyInstaller binary.

subItems.title: packages/moonshine-linux-x64/package.json exists with os: ["linux"], cpu: ["x64"], version 0.1.0
packages/moonshine-linux-x64/bin/ directory exists (placeholder for sidecar binary)
root package.json lists moonshine-linux-x64 as optionalDependencies

narrative.Action: Create scripts/build-moonshine-sidecars.js. The script installs moonshine-voice via pip into a venv and runs PyInstaller --onefile to produce packages/moonshine-linux-x64/bin/moonshine-sidecar. Also create the sidecar main.py: reads {type:'audio',encoding:'pcm16le',sampleRate:24000,audio:base64} JSONL from stdin, emits {type:'ready'} on startup, then {type:'transcript:partial',text} and {type:'transcript:committed',text} to stdout. Add npm run build:sidecar in package.json.

subItems.title: scripts/build-moonshine-sidecars.js creates venv, installs moonshine-voice, runs PyInstaller
Sidecar main.py implements the JSONL protocol: audio→pcm16le base64 in, ready/partial/committed out
npm run build:sidecar script defined in package.json

narrative.Action: Create src/voice/transcription.ts. Export ITurnEmitter interface: { onPartial(cb): void, onCommitted(cb): void, sendAudio(pcm: Buffer): void, stop(): void, close(): void }. Export createMoonshineTranscription(modelSize: string): ITurnEmitter — spawns sidecar binary, establishes JSONL stdin/stdout pipe, emits ready, routes partial/committed to callbacks. Emits error event on unexpected sidecar exit. THIS BEAD requires inspection because all downstream modules (ws-voice, transcription-manager, Google Cloud fallback) depend on ITurnEmitter's exact shape.

subItems.title: ITurnEmitter interface exported with onPartial(cb), onCommitted(cb), sendAudio(pcm: Buffer), stop(), close()
createMoonshineTranscription() resolves sidecar binary path from packages/moonshine-linux-x64/bin/
JSONL wire protocol: {type:audio,encoding:pcm16le,sampleRate:24000,audio:base64} to sidecar; partial/committed from sidecar
Emits error event if sidecar process exits unexpectedly

narrative.Action: Create src/voice/turn-queue.ts. Export createTurnQueue(emitter: ITurnEmitter, onTurn: (text: string) => void) — 150ms debounce on committed events, coalesces buffered chunks. Export isTrivialTranscript(text: string): boolean — filters single-word filler utterances (um, uh, yeah, okay, etc.).

subItems.title: createTurnQueue() wraps ITurnEmitter with 150ms debounce on committed events
isTrivialTranscript() returns true for single filler words
Unit test: two committed events within 150ms coalesce into one onTurn call

narrative.Action: Create src/voice/transcription-manager.ts. Export VoiceSettings type. Export createTranscriptionManager(settings: VoiceSettings): { applyCurrent(): void, getActive(): ITurnEmitter | null, close(): void }. applyCurrent() tears down old ITurnEmitter and creates new one based on settings.stt.provider. Supports 'moonshine' and 'google-cloud'. THIS BEAD requires inspection because P3 (Google Cloud) plugs into applyCurrent() — wrong interface = redo P3.

subItems.title: createTranscriptionManager() returns { applyCurrent, getActive, close }
applyCurrent() tears down old ITurnEmitter and creates new one based on settings.stt.provider
VoiceSettings type exported: { stt: { provider: 'moonshine'|'google-cloud', moonshine: {model:string}, googleCloud: {apiKey:string, model:string} } }

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/server/ws-voice.ts using the same noServer+upgrade pattern as ws-terminal.ts. Export setupVoiceWebSocket(server: http.Server). On client connect: reads current voice settings, creates TranscriptionManager + TurnQueue. Binary WebSocket frames → sendAudio(). JSON back to client: {type:transcript:partial,text} and {type:transcript:committed,text}. On close: transcriptionManager.close(). One active transcription per connection.

subItems.title: setupVoiceWebSocket(server) exported, registers on /ws/voice upgrade path using noServer pattern
Binary WebSocket frames forwarded to transcription manager as PCM audio
JSON frames {type:'transcript:partial'} and {type:'transcript:committed'} sent back to client
TranscriptionManager torn down on WebSocket close

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/server/routes/voice.ts as an Effect HTTP route module. GET /api/voice/settings — reads from ~/.panopticon/voice-settings.json with defaults {stt:{provider:'moonshine',moonshine:{model:'base'},googleCloud:{model:'latest_long',apiKey:''}}}. PUT /api/voice/settings — validates and persists. Follow existing pattern in settings.ts.

subItems.title: GET /api/voice/settings returns VoiceSettings JSON with defaults when file missing
PUT /api/voice/settings validates payload shape and persists to ~/.panopticon/voice-settings.json

items.title: Wire setupVoiceWebSocket and voice routes into server.ts

narrative.Action: In src/dashboard/server/server.ts, import setupVoiceWebSocket and call it alongside setupTerminalWebSocket before Effect upgrade listeners. Register voice route module in the Effect HTTP router.

subItems.title: setupVoiceWebSocket called in server.ts before Effect upgrade listeners
Voice settings route registered in Effect HTTP router

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/frontend/src/hooks/useVoiceTranscription.ts. getUserMedia({audio:{deviceId}}), AudioContext at 24kHz (ScriptProcessorNode resampler if needed), /ws/voice WebSocket, binary PCM frames. Returns { start, stop, partialText, committedText, isListening, error, analyserNode }. analyserNode exposes AnalyserNode for waveform canvas.

subItems.title: start() requests mic access and opens /ws/voice WebSocket
PCM audio sent as binary WebSocket frames at 24kHz mono
partialText and committedText state updated from server transcript events
analyserNode exposed for waveform visualization
stop() closes mic stream and WebSocket cleanly

items.title: Implement VoiceWidget.tsx — collapsible widget with waveform, preview, Edit+Direct modes

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/chat/VoiceWidget.tsx. Collapsed: mic button with idle/listening/processing/error states. Expanded: mic device picker, model picker (tiny/base), waveform canvas (AnalyserNode + requestAnimationFrame), partial transcript preview, Edit/Direct mode toggle, Stop/Cancel/Send buttons. Props: conversation, onInsert(text), onSendDirect(text).

subItems.title: Collapsed state shows mic button with idle/listening/error icons
Expanded state shows waveform canvas animating from AnalyserNode when listening
Partial transcript text updates live during speech
Edit mode: Stop inserts committed text via onInsert()
Direct mode: committed transcript fires onSendDirect() immediately without inserting into editor
Mic device picker populated from navigator.mediaDevices.enumerateDevices()

narrative.Action: Modify src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/chat/ComposerFooter.tsx. Add isVoiceWidgetOpen state. Add mic button in composerToolbar div. Render VoiceWidget below toolbar when open. onInsert prefills Lexical editor. onSendDirect calls existing handleSubmit path. handleSubmit() unchanged.

subItems.title: Mic button visible in ComposerFooter toolbar
Click mic button toggles VoiceWidget expanded/collapsed
onInsert prefills committed text into Lexical editor
onSendDirect sends message through existing handleSubmit path without editor interaction

items.title: Add Voice Settings section to the Settings page

narrative.Action: Add a Voice section to the Settings tab. STT provider picker (Moonshine/Google Cloud STT). Moonshine model picker (tiny/base). Google Cloud: API key input + model selector. Hardware device settings in localStorage: input device, output device, volume. Persists backend settings via PUT /api/voice/settings.

subItems.title: STT provider picker (Moonshine / Google Cloud STT) in Settings > Voice
Moonshine model picker (tiny/base) shown when Moonshine selected
Google Cloud API key field shown when Google Cloud STT selected
Changes persisted via PUT /api/voice/settings

narrative.Action: Frontend: add @excalidraw/excalidraw to src/dashboard/frontend/package.json. Root (server): add ai (Vercel AI SDK), @ai-sdk/openai, @google-cloud/speech. Run bun install from workspace root.

subItems.title: @excalidraw/excalidraw in frontend package.json dependencies
ai, @ai-sdk/openai, @google-cloud/speech in root package.json dependencies
bun install completes without errors after changes

narrative.Action: Create src/autopreso/whiteboard-elements.ts. Export normalizeElements(elements) — validates/fills missing Excalidraw fields (id, type, x, y, width, height, version, versionNonce), logs warning for impossible coordinates.

subItems.title: normalizeElements() fills missing required Excalidraw element fields with defaults
Warning logged for elements with x/y outside visible canvas range

items.title: Implement src/autopreso/whiteboard-tools.ts — line-numbered ops schema and apply

narrative.Action: Create src/autopreso/whiteboard-tools.ts. Export formatLineNumberedWhiteboard(elements): string. Export applyWhiteboardEditOperations(elements, ops): ExcalidrawElement[]. Export Op type: { action: 'replace'|'insert_after'|'delete', lineNumber: number, element?: ExcalidrawElement }. THIS BEAD requires inspection because the whiteboard agent's AI SDK tool schemas and all downstream prompt construction depend on Op's exact shape.

subItems.title: formatLineNumberedWhiteboard() returns numbered lines: '1: rectangle text="Box A" at (100,200)'
applyWhiteboardEditOperations() supports replace, insert_after, delete ops by line number
Op type exported: { action: 'replace'|'insert_after'|'delete', lineNumber: number, element?: ExcalidrawElement }
Unit tests cover replace, insert_after, delete on a 3-element canvas

narrative.Action: Create src/autopreso/whiteboard-keywords.ts. Export extractKeywords(elements: ExcalidrawElement[]): string[] — extracts text labels from type='text' elements and boundElements with text labels. Used to bias STT transcription toward whiteboard vocabulary.

subItems.title: extractKeywords() returns text strings from text elements and bound text on shapes

items.title: Implement src/autopreso/session.ts — staging/live state machine + warmup loop

narrative.Action: Create src/autopreso/session.ts. Export createWhiteboardSession(). Manages staging (client scratchpad) and live (server owns state.elements) modes. start() snapshots staging primer, extracts keywords, transitions to live, fires runWhiteboardWarmupOnce(). Warmup: up to 8 attempts, exponential backoff (2s→4s→8s→…→30s cap). After warmup, forces agentHistory to [warmup_user_msg, {role:'assistant',content:'UNDERSTOOD'}]. Exposes canvasDirtyForAgent flag. THIS BEAD requires inspection because the warmup loop and agentHistory prefix are the caching foundation — every subsequent agent turn depends on this exact history.

subItems.title: createWhiteboardSession() returns { mode, elements, start, backToStaging, reset, agentHistory, canvasDirtyForAgent }
start() transitions mode staging→live and fires warmup loop
Warmup retries up to 8 times with exponential backoff, capping at 30s per attempt
After warmup completes, agentHistory is exactly [warmup_user_msg, { role:'assistant', content:'UNDERSTOOD' }]

items.title: Implement src/autopreso/agent.ts — runWhiteboardAgent() with AI SDK tool calls

narrative.Action: Create src/autopreso/agent.ts. Export runWhiteboardAgent(transcript, session, settings): Promise<ExcalidrawElement[]>. Three providers via createOpenAI adapter: openai (OPENAI_API_KEY), codex (reads ~/.codex/auth.json bearer), ollama (localhost:11434/v1). Two colocated tools: whiteboard_apply (ops + optional viewport command) and whiteboard_overwrite (full reset). System prompt includes formatLineNumberedWhiteboard() output. On tool call: apply ops via applyWhiteboardEditOperations(), normalize via normalizeElements(). Also export runWhiteboardWarmupOnce(session, settings).

subItems.title: runWhiteboardAgent() calls generateText() with whiteboard_apply and whiteboard_overwrite tools
Provider selection: openai/codex/ollama from settings.autopreso.provider
Codex reads ~/.codex/auth.json for bearer token
whiteboard_apply tool applies ops and updates session.elements
runWhiteboardWarmupOnce() exported for session.ts warmup loop

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/server/routes/autopreso.ts. Effect HTTP route module. POST /api/autopreso/start — body {elements, screenshotBase64}, calls session.start(), returns {mode:'live'}. POST /api/autopreso/back-to-staging — returns {mode:'staging'}. POST /api/autopreso/session/reset — returns {mode:'staging'}. One singleton session per server.

subItems.title: POST /api/autopreso/start transitions to live mode and returns {mode:'live'}
POST /api/autopreso/back-to-staging transitions to staging and returns {mode:'staging'}
POST /api/autopreso/session/reset clears all elements and resets to staging

items.title: Implement src/dashboard/server/ws-autopreso.ts — whiteboard state broadcast WebSocket

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/server/ws-autopreso.ts using noServer pattern. Export setupAutoPresoWebSocket(server, session). On connect: send {type:'whiteboard:snapshot', mode, elements}. On whiteboard update (called by runWhiteboardAgent): broadcast {type:'whiteboard:update', elements} to all clients. Multiple tabs see same canvas.

subItems.title: setupAutoPresoWebSocket() registers /ws/autopreso upgrade path
On connect: sends {type:'whiteboard:snapshot', mode, elements}
On update: broadcasts {type:'whiteboard:update', elements} to all connected clients

items.title: Wire AutoPreso WebSocket and routes into server.ts

narrative.Action: In server.ts: import and call setupAutoPresoWebSocket() alongside existing WebSocket setups. Register autopreso route module in Effect HTTP router. Singleton session passed between routes and WebSocket handler.

subItems.title: setupAutoPresoWebSocket() called in server.ts startup
AutoPreso HTTP routes registered in Effect router

items.title: Implement AutoPresoControls.tsx — mic, warmup status, staging/live toggle

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/autopreso/AutoPresoControls.tsx. Props: mode, warmupStatus (idle/warming/ready/failed), onStart, onBackToStaging, onReset, isListening, onToggleMic. Renders: mic toggle button, warmup status indicator, staging↔live toggle, agent instructions textarea, Reset button.

subItems.title: Mic button toggles isListening with visual indicator
Warmup status shown as idle/warming/ready/failed with appropriate icon
Staging/live toggle calls onStart or onBackToStaging based on current mode

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/autopreso/TranscriptPanel.tsx. Props: turns (committed with timestamps), partialText. Displays committed turns with timestamps, auto-scrolls to bottom. Current partial transcript shown in italic/dimmed style.

subItems.title: Committed turns displayed with timestamps, newest at bottom with auto-scroll
Current partial transcript shown in distinct style (italic/dimmed)

items.title: Implement useAutoPresoWebSocket.ts — combined audio + whiteboard state hook

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/frontend/src/hooks/useAutoPresoWebSocket.ts. Combines /ws/voice transcription and /ws/autopreso whiteboard state. Receives whiteboard:snapshot and whiteboard:update, merges into elements state. Returns { elements, mode, warmupStatus, partialText, committedTurns, isListening, startListening, stopListening, analyserNode }. Reconnects to /ws/autopreso with exponential backoff. Note: the hook does not POST to /api/autopreso/start — that's called by AutoPresoControls via onStart.

subItems.title: Subscribes to /ws/autopreso for whiteboard:snapshot and whiteboard:update
elements state updated on whiteboard:update broadcast
Voice transcription integrated: partialText and committedTurns tracked
Reconnects to /ws/autopreso on disconnect with exponential backoff

items.title: Implement AutoPresoView.tsx — Excalidraw canvas + control panel

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/autopreso/AutoPresoView.tsx. Excalidraw canvas (controlled mode, dynamic import to avoid SSR issues) + sidebar with AutoPresoControls + TranscriptPanel. Staging mode: Excalidraw fully interactive. Live mode: elements from server are source of truth, local edits do not override server state. Agent viewport commands (scroll_to_content, zoom) applied via excalidrawAPI.

subItems.title: Excalidraw canvas rendered with controlled elements from useAutoPresoWebSocket
Staging mode: Excalidraw fully interactive (user can draw)
Live mode: server elements are source of truth, local edits do not overwrite server state
AutoPresoControls and TranscriptPanel rendered in sidebar panel

items.title: Add /autopreso tab to App.tsx, Header Tab type, and Sidebar nav

narrative.Action: Add 'autopreso' to Tab union in Header.tsx. Add autopreso: '/autopreso' to TAB_PATHS in App.tsx. Add {activeTab === 'autopreso' && <AutoPresoView />} render block. Add AutoPreso nav item (Mic2 icon) to Operations group in Sidebar NAV_GROUPS.

subItems.title: 'autopreso' added to Tab union type in Header.tsx
'/autopreso' registered in TAB_PATHS, renders AutoPresoView
AutoPreso nav item with Mic2 icon in Sidebar Operations group

narrative.Action: Create src/voice/google-cloud-transcription.ts. Export createGoogleCloudTranscription(apiKey: string, modelName: string): ITurnEmitter. Uses @google-cloud/speech StreamingRecognize. Accepts 24kHz PCM, streams to GCP, emits partial/committed matching ITurnEmitter exactly. Integration test gated on GOOGLE_CLOUD_SPEECH_API_KEY env var — skipped if not set.

subItems.title: createGoogleCloudTranscription() returns ITurnEmitter (same interface as Moonshine)
Audio streamed to Google Cloud Speech StreamingRecognize API
Partial results → onPartial callback, final results → onCommitted callback
Integration test skipped if GOOGLE_CLOUD_SPEECH_API_KEY not set

items.title: Wire Google Cloud STT into transcription-manager hot-swap

narrative.Action: Modify src/voice/transcription-manager.ts. When settings.stt.provider === 'google-cloud', instantiate createGoogleCloudTranscription(settings.stt.googleCloud.apiKey, settings.stt.googleCloud.model). Provider switch tears down old ITurnEmitter and creates new one. /ws/voice connection stays open across swap.

subItems.title: applyCurrent() instantiates createGoogleCloudTranscription() for provider 'google-cloud'
Hot-swap: Moonshine→Google Cloud tears down old ITurnEmitter, creates new one
WebSocket connection remains open across provider swap
